title: Spring Hackathon 2026
description: Our flagship 24-hour hackathon! Build something amazing with your team. All skill levels welcome. Prizes for top 3 teams including cash, software licenses, and internship interviews.

title: Intro to Machine Learning Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop covering the fundamentals of ML using Python and scikit-learn. We'll build and train a model from scratch. Bring your laptop!

title: Industry Panel: Landing a Tech Internship
description: Hear from engineers at top tech companies about their internship journeys, how they got their offers, and tips for acing technical interviews.

title: Web Dev Bootcamp
description: A full-day bootcamp covering React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS. Participants built and deployed a personal portfolio by the end of the day.

title: Fall Kickoff & Club Fair
description: We kicked off the new semester with pizza, demos of our latest projects, and recruited 30+ new members. Thanks to everyone who came out!

title: CTF Competition — Internal Round
description: Our first internal capture-the-flag competition. Teams competed across web, crypto, reverse engineering, and forensics challenges. Congrats to Team ByteBusters!
